value: China-nexus ORB (Operational Relay Box) espionage-infrastructure case: UAT-7810 / LapDogs. UAT-7810 compromises unpatched SOHO/embedded networking devices (primarily Ruckus wireless routers) and turns them into relay nodes used by SECONDARY China-nexus APTs (e.g. UAT-5918) to proxy their own operations. Talos assesses UAT-7810 China-nexus with HIGH confidence; JARLEASH config carries Simplified-Chinese comments. The IPv4 / URL indicators below are attacker-acquired VPS download/relay servers observed by Talos (2026-07) and DECAY - ORB infra is rotated; validate freshness before blocking rather than trusting a static list. The file hashes are the confirmed malware set (LONGLEASH, DOGLEASH x many arch/variant builds, JARLEASH, LEASHTEST). Full hash list and Snort SIDs in the Talos report.
